inputs.label: Inside Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The inner diameter of the ring in millimeters.

inputs.label: Inside Circumference (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The inner circumference of the ring in millimeters.

inputs.label: Inside Diameter (inches)
inputs.businessContext: The inner diameter of the ring in inches.

inputs.label: Inside Circumference (inches)
inputs.businessContext: The inner circumference of the ring in inches.

inputs.label: Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: A multiplier to adjust the calculated size (e.g., for different temperature or manufacturing tolerance).

formulas.diameter_inches_used: diameter_inches > 0 ? diameter_inches : (circumference_inches > 0 ? circumference_inches / Math.PI : (diameter_mm > 0 ? diameter_mm / 25.4 : (circumference_mm > 0 ? (circumference_mm / 25.4) / Math.PI : 0)))
